title: vampires-resourcepack
description: The resource pack to go along with the Vampires Datapack.
body:
# Vampire Resource pack

To be used along side the [Vampires datapack](https://modrinth.com/project/vampires-datapack). 

Contains:
- Custom Weapons/Tools
- A couple custom helmets to play into the halloween theme.
- Ability icons for the custom items and makes them invisible to other players when held.

Most likely more still to come.
